title: urena lobata var. scabriuscula
intro: Urena lobata var. scabriuscula is a variety of the Urena lobata plant, commonly known as the cocklebur or cockle-bur, a type of annual herb in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Urena lobata var. scabriuscula include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
